task_completion.description: Navigate to the SALESTEAM campaign settings in the Vicidial admin interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see the Vicidial web interface open to the Campaigns section, specifically showing the settings or detail view for the 'SALESTEAM' campaign.
The VLM should see a preset form or list containing Preset Name 'SpanishSupport', Preset Number '8007426225', an empty DTMF field, and Hide Number set to 'N'.
The VLM should see a preset form or list containing Preset Name 'BillingDept', Preset Number '8005553200', DTMF set to '2', and Hide Number set to 'N'.
The VLM should see a preset form or list containing Preset Name 'TechSupport', Preset Number '8005551800', DTMF set to '1', and Hide Number set to 'N'.

task_completion.description: Save and verify all three presets are active for the campaign.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see a final confirmation screen or a list view showing all three presets (SpanishSupport, BillingDept, TechSupport) successfully saved and associated with the SALESTEAM campaign.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Vicidial web interface to configure presets.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must show a web browser interacting with the Vicidial admin GUI. There should be no terminal windows executing MySQL INSERT commands.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual application form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The preset details must be entered into the actual Vicidial HTML form fields, not typed into a text editor, notepad, or a generic search bar.

integrity.description: Ensure the presets are being added to the correct campaign.
integrity.visual_evidence: The surrounding page context (headers, breadcrumbs, or campaign ID fields) must clearly indicate that the active campaign being modified is 'SALESTEAM'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Campaign: SALESTEAM. Required Presets to verify: 1) Name: SpanishSupport, Number: 8007426225, DTMF: (empty), Hide: N. 2) Name: BillingDept, Number: 8005553200, DTMF: 2, Hide: N. 3) Name: TechSupport, Number: 8005551800, DTMF: 1, Hide: N.
